errors.name: NotOwner
errors.msg: Caller is not the configured owner / authority

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Battles are paused

errors.name: WrongStatus
errors.msg: Wrong battle status for this action

errors.name: CannotJoinOwnBattle
errors.msg: Cannot join your own battle

errors.name: NotYourBattle
errors.msg: Caller is not playerA

errors.name: NotWinner
errors.msg: Caller is not the winner

errors.name: NotLoser
errors.msg: Caller is not the loser

errors.name: DecisionPeriodExpired
errors.msg: Decision period has expired

errors.name: DecisionPeriodActive
errors.msg: Decision period still active

errors.name: JoinPeriodNotExpired
errors.msg: Join period has not expired

errors.name: VrfNotTimedOut
errors.msg: VRF has not timed out yet

errors.name: NotVrfAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the registered VRF authority

errors.name: InvalidTier
errors.msg: Pool tier index out of range

errors.name: InvalidTimeout
errors.msg: Invalid timeout (out of allowed window)

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee bps too high (max 10%)

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient internal balance

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: WrongChip
errors.msg: Wrong chip account passed for this battle slot

errors.name: WrongPlayer
errors.msg: Wrong player account — does not match battle.player_a / player_b

errors.name: WrongVrfProgram
errors.msg: Randomness account is not owned by the configured Switchboard program

errors.name: SwitchboardDisabled
errors.msg: Switchboard VRF disabled (vrf_program is zero) — call set_vrf_program first

errors.name: MalformedRandomnessAccount
errors.msg: Switchboard randomness account is malformed (wrong size or discriminator)

errors.name: RandomnessNotRevealed
errors.msg: Switchboard randomness has not been revealed yet (value_slot <= seed_slot)

errors.name: InvalidMaxPlayers
errors.msg: max_players must be between 2 and BR_MAX_PLAYERS

errors.name: BattleRoyaleFull
errors.msg: Battle Royale already full

errors.name: AlreadyJoined
errors.msg: Player has already joined this Battle Royale

errors.name: NotAParticipant
errors.msg: Caller is not a participant of this Battle Royale

errors.name: ChipAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Chip already claimed for this Battle Royale slot

errors.name: PrizeAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Prize already claimed for this Battle Royale

errors.name: TicketMintAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Ticket SPL mint already initialised — init_ticket_mint is one-shot

errors.name: WrongTicketMint
errors.msg: Provided ticket mint does not match config.ticket_mint

errors.name: TournamentRegistrationClosed
errors.msg: Tournament registration period closed or full

errors.name: TournamentNotReady
errors.msg: Tournament lobby not full — cannot start yet

errors.name: TournamentMatchNotPending
errors.msg: Match is not in PENDING state

errors.name: WrongTournamentRound
errors.msg: Match does not belong to the current round

errors.name: TournamentNotComplete
errors.msg: Tournament has not completed — prize unavailable

errors.name: WrongPrizeRank
errors.msg: Prize rank must be 0 (1st), 1 (2nd), or 2 (3rd)

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow
